ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_count_stations" (
  "tcs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic counting station */,
  "main_street" TEXT /* Name of the main street where the TCS is located */,
  "midblock_route" TEXT /* Name of the midblock route (if any) */,
  "side1_route" TEXT /* Name of the first side route (if any) */,
  "side2_route" TEXT /* Name of the second side route (if any) */,
  "activation_date" TEXT /* Date when the TCS was activated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the TCS */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the TCS */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the TCS was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the TCS was last maintained */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of traffic counting station */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera associated with the TCS (if any) */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor associated with the TCS (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tcs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_count_stations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_count_stations_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES cameras ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volume_data" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume data entry */,
  "tcs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic counting station where the data was collected */,
  "count_date" TEXT /* Date when the volume was counted */,
  "vehicle_volume_8hr" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles counted over an 8-hour period */,
  "pedestrian_volume_8hr" INTEGER /* Number of pedestrians counted over an 8-hour period */,
  "vehicle_volume_24hr" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles counted over a 24-hour period */,
  "pedestrian_volume_24hr" INTEGER /* Number of pedestrians counted over a 24-hour period */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the volume was counted */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week when the volume was counted */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions when the volume was counted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volume_data_tcs_id FOREIGN KEY ("tcs_id") REFERENCES traffic_count_stations ("tcs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cameras" (
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera */,
  "camera_type" TEXT /* Type of camera */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the camera was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the camera was last maintained */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the camera */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last maintained */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password chosen by the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the permission applies */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table to which the permission applies */,
  "read_permission" INTEGER /* Whether the user has read permission for the table */,
  "write_permission" INTEGER /* Whether the user has write permission for the table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the research study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the research study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_studies" (
  "tcs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic counting station */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tcs_id", "study_id"),
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_studies_tcs_id FOREIGN KEY ("tcs_id") REFERENCES traffic_count_stations ("tcs_id"),
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_studies_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id")
)
